scenario_description: The user wants to add a contact person at the end of the work report but doesn't say who. The agent asks first.

command:
printf 'Annual Work Report

I. Overview
The company maintained stable operations this year, meeting all key performance targets.

II. Key Achievements
1. Sales revenue increased by 15%% year-over-year
2. Customer satisfaction rose to 92%%
3. Added 20 new business partners

III. Future Plans
Continue advancing digital transformation and strengthen team building.
' > /home/user/Desktop/work_report.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add that contact person
Add "Contact: Chen Gang" at the end of the document, then save
